title: Kitsure Dish Drainer Rack- Space-Saving Dish Drainer, Dish Racks for Kitchen Counter, Stainless Steel Kitchen Drying Rack with a Cutlery Holder, Large, Black
features: Small volume: the Kitsure dish drainer is suitable for kitchens with limited space. Measures only 39.6*30.5*12.4cm, while being able to hold 6 plates and other bowls and glasses. With a Kitsure dish drying rack you can perfectly save space on your countertop.

Premium Durable Material - Kitsure kitchen dish drying rack is made of high-quality stainless steel which can effectively prevent rust and deformation. And it can be easily cleaned by rinsing it under a running faucet. It would be a reassuring option for you to set utensils.

Rotating Water Outlet This kitchen dish drying rack is equipped with a rotating water outlet that can be rotated in three directions, so that the water from the dishes can be brought to the sink. There will be no water left on the counter!

CONVENIENT TO USE - Kitsure drying rack for kitchen consists of a cutlery holder, a dish rack and a drainer set. With such a simple structure, it is easy to install as no tools are needed in the process. And with four silicone leg covers to prevent slipping, the dish rack stays firmly where it is.

Detachable Silverware Holder - The cutlery holder of this dish drying rack is divided into two spaces for cutlery and other small items. With this dish rack, you can always find the right place for various tableware!
